visual_findings: The long_thin cap reduced persisted DisplayDim to the 006 reference floor and visibly removed some excess dimension clutter.
The generated drawing is still AutoDimension-led rather than reference-intent-led; dimension groups do not match the same-name reference drawing.
The front/top long views still use heavy baseline dimension chains instead of the concise end, hole, and inspection placement seen in the reference.
The generated titlebar and notes are present, but the overall drawing is still not acceptable as a final manufacturing drawing.
cases.required_next_action: Replace generic AutoDimension output with reference-intent dimension groups for long_thin parts: overall length/width, end offsets, hole positions, small projected-view size, and only required radius/thread callouts.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
